mapper.select: SELECT AUTHORITY, COMPANY_ID, PHOTO_ADDRESS, SEX, UPDATE_TIME, USER_CD, USER_MAIL, FIRST_NAME, LAST_NAME, USER_STATUS, USER_TEL FROM user_tbl WHERE DEL_FLG = '0' AND ( AUTHORITY IN '21'、'31' OR( AUTHORITY = '11' AND a0301VueForm.authority = '00' ) ) AND LAST_NAME || FIRST_NAME LIKE '%A0301VueForm.userName%' AND USER_MAIL LIKE '%A0301VueForm.userMail%' AND USER_TEL LIKE '%A0301VueForm.userTel%' ORDER BY UPDATE_TIME DESC
